summary: Local reads signal dropped filters via meta.unscoped/unapplied_params and honor --limit/--offset instead of returning the whole cache.
reason: resolveLocal returns all synced rows and never applies endpoint filters; the only signal was a stderr warning that JSON/agent consumers never see. Added Unscoped/UnappliedParams provenance (set only for non-empty, non-pagination params) and threaded the caller's limit/offset into the local list read so a get-* --data-source local request is bounded rather than dumping the store.
